title: rapanea lanaiensis
intro: Rapanea lanaiensis, also known as the Hawaiian mountain apple or mountain hawia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rapanea lanaiensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Rapanea lanaiensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
